cooperation.transfer.port.name: Data Transfer Session Port
cooperation.transfer.port.description[zh_CN]: 用于配置数据迁移工具的控制通信端口。为0时使用默认端口或用户设置，非0时覆盖用户设置且不受端口范围限制。
cooperation.transfer.port.description: Configures the control communication port for the data transfer tool. When set to 0, the default port or user setting is used. Non-zero values override user settings without range restrictions.
